page_content:
Prerequisite: PHYS261 and PHYS260.

Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Fischell Department of Bioengineering department.

Credit Only Granted for: BIOE232, ENES232, ENME232, or ENME320.

BIOE241 Biocomputational Methods (3 Credits)

Application of computer technology to biological and natural resource systems considering engineering aspects. Designed to help students

in the use of computer technology for problem solving. The course will cover 4-5 software packages important for later use by the student. Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Fischell Department of Bioengineering department.
